name: Froggino Frullatorino
lore:
Lore of Froggino Frullatorino
                                    


Froggino Frullatorino is a frog stuck inside a blender with slices of kiwi and orange in it. Around the blender, there are slices of orange, lemon and grapefruit.
Lyrics
Original (Italian)
Froggino Frullatorino. Frulli frulli frulliccina, el Frogiato Frullatorinato.
Translated (English)
Froggino Frullatorino. Frulli frulli frulliccina, the Frogiato Frullatorinato.
